pending.body: finding_summary: The new tmux regression test can silently pass without exercising the stdout-only exhaustion path because it bails out on `TmuxAdapter::check_tmux_available()` before the fake tmux binary is added to `PATH`. On environments that do not have a real `tmux` installed, `tests/unit/tmux_adapter_test.rs:416-423` returns early and never covers the `src/adapters/tmux.rs:632-644` classification logic added by this bead. severity: low affected_files: ["tests/unit/tmux_adapter_test.rs:416-423", "src/adapters/tmux.rs:632-644"] remediation_hint: Install the fake tmux fixture before the availability check, or switch the guard to `check_tmux_available_in()` against the temporary bin dir so the test always exercises the new code path.

status_summary: running: final review restart round 5 -> Plan and Implement
